description: Investigate and document the root cause, symptoms, and workaround for the problem record 'Recurring freeze on HR Payroll System'. Record the Root Cause as 'Deadlock detected in SQL Server transaction log. The Weekly_Audit_Report query locks the Employee_Records table while the payroll batch job attempts to write to it.' Record the Symptoms as 'Users experience 500 Internal Server Error when submitting timesheets between 14:00 and 15:00 on Fridays. Application logs show SQLSTATE 40001.' Record the Workaround as 'Restart the PayrollService on the application server (VM-HR-01). We have temporarily rescheduled the audit report to run at 02:00 AM Saturday.'

metadata.problem_title: Recurring freeze on HR Payroll System
